title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at KFC India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at KFC India
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
